testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid user details", "Login"](1)
testcase.system-out:
21:56:20 INFO DriverManager - Closing Android Driver. 21:56:20 INFO DriverManager - Driver removed from ThreadLocal.

Entering text into element: By.xpath: //*[@resource-id='username_input_field' or @resource-id='com.tui.qa.challenge:id/username_input_field'] When the user enters a valid username # com.tui.qa.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.theUserEntersAValidUsername() 21:56:26 INFO BasePage -
